summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Red Team Framework Payload Generator and LHOST Injection features. All 14 backend API tests pass (100%). All frontend features verified working including 11 payload templates, LHOST injection in all payloads/chains/MSF commands, and global config persistence.
passed_tests: GET /api/config - Returns listener_ip=10.10.14.99 and listener_port=5555
PUT /api/config - Updates config and persists in MongoDB
GET /api/payloads/templates - Returns 11 payloads with global_lhost=10.10.14.99 and global_lport=5555
All 11 payload templates have LHOST injected in generator_cmd and handler_cmd
POST /api/payloads/generate with bash_reverse - Returns payload_content with LHOST 10.10.14.99:5555
POST /api/payloads/generate with windows/meterpreter/reverse_tcp - Returns generator_cmd with LHOST=10.10.14.99 LPORT=5555
POST /api/payloads/generate with powershell_reverse - Returns payload_content with LHOST 10.10.14.99
POST /api/payloads/generate with sliver_session - Returns generator_cmd with mtls lhost
POST /api/payloads/generate without LHOST configured - Returns 400 error with 'LHOST not configured' message
POST /api/chains/web_to_shell/generate - Injects LHOST from global config into persistence step
POST /api/chains/execute for phishing_to_shell - Injects LHOST from global config
POST /api/metasploit/execute - rc_command contains 'set LHOST 10.10.14.99' and 'set LPORT 5555'
POST /api/scan/start - Starts scan and returns scan_id
GET /api/scan/{id}/status - Returns completed status after ~8 seconds
Frontend - All 9 navigation tabs render (Dashboard, Targets, Attack Graph, Chains, C2, Payloads, AI, Config, Logs)
Frontend - Payloads section shows 11 templates with filter buttons (all, windows, linux, oneliner, implant)
Frontend - GENERATE button calls backend and shows payload detail with LHOST injected
Frontend - Config section shows LHOST input with 10.10.14.99, Quick Payload Commands contain correct IP
Frontend - Sidebar shows LHOST: 10.10.14.99 in green
Frontend - Dashboard scan starts from UI, ABORT button appears during scan
seed_data_creation: None required - global config already has listener_ip=10.10.14.99 and listener_port=5555
context_for_next_testing_agent: All payload generator and LHOST injection features fully tested and working: 1) 11 payload templates available (Windows Meterpreter TCP/HTTPS, Windows Shell, Linux Shell/Meterpreter, PHP, Bash/Python/PowerShell oneliners, Sliver Session/Beacon). 2) Global config persists LHOST=10.10.14.99 and LPORT=5555 to MongoDB. 3) LHOST auto-injects into all payload generator_cmd, handler_cmd, payload_content fields. 4) Chain commands have LHOST injected in persistence steps. 5) MSF execute rc_command contains 'set LHOST' with global config IP. 6) Frontend Payloads section shows all 11 templates with working filter buttons and GENERATE buttons. 7) Config section shows LHOST input and Quick Payload Commands with correct IP. 8) Sidebar shows LHOST status in green when configured.

payload_templates.lhost_injection: All templates have LHOST injected in generator_cmd and handler_cmd

global_config.auto_inject: LHOST auto-injects into all payloads when auto_lhost=true

chain_lhost_injection.web_to_shell: LHOST injected in persistence step (crontab, schtasks)
chain_lhost_injection.phishing_to_shell: LHOST injected in payload generation and chisel commands

frontend_payloads_section.generate_button: Calls POST /api/payloads/generate and shows detail panel

mocked_apis.note: msfvenom/msfconsole returns simulated (FileNotFoundError). Kimi AI returns 401. Sliver offline. This is expected in preview environment.
